package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_string_handling_fmt_sprintf_for_simple_concat: Layer: String handling. Flag fmt.Sprintf used for simple string concatenation on hot or repeated paths.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario595Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
